descriptors=try:1:truefalsetrue|race:1:truefalsetrue|withResolvers:0:truefalsetrue
custom-generic=construct|callback:20:22|resolve:42|construct|reject:custom|construct|static-resolve:42|then:42|resolve:42||TypeError||TypeError||TypeError
try=call:19:23|after-return|throw|after-throw|fulfilled:42|rejected:true
withResolvers=promise,resolve,reject||promise:truetruetrue|resolve:truetruetrue|reject:truetruetrue||after-settle|fulfilled:42
race-empty-fifo=pending|checkpoint|winner:first
race-resolve-getter=resolve-get
race-next-no-close=iterator|next
race-resolve-close=next|resolve|close
race-then-close=next|then|close|original:true
race-gc=42
r3n-promise-static-oracle=ok
